result:
Saved to `article.md` — roughly 900 words, covering all five use cases with concrete examples and a closing "where to start" section.

`★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`
Two structural choices worth noting: each example follows a consistent "before/after" pattern (tedious manual process → quick AI-assisted version) which makes the value concrete rather than abstract, and every example explicitly names what the human still checks or edits — this keeps the "no hype" tone honest by acknowledging these are drafting/assistance tools, not autonomous replacements.
`─────────────────────────────────────────────────`
